subject: A white seagull in mid-flight with wings spread wide, swooping toward a robed human figure on a coastal cliffside who raises an arm defensively against the bird
description: A large white gull with outstretched wings dives across the foreground, beak open, body angled toward a robed figure standing on a coastal walkway or cliff edge. The figure, draped in light-colored classical robes, lifts an arm to ward off or shield from the swooping bird. The background is bright daylight blue with streaky clouds and a hint of sea or sky, rendered in pale blues and warm tans. The composition is dynamic and slightly comedic, capturing the moment of harassment by the gull. The Greek-classical aesthetic of Theros is visible in the figure's drapery and the open, sun-bleached coastal setting.
foreground: white gull mid-flight, wings spread, beak open, diving across frame
background: robed human figure on a coastal cliff or walkway, blue sky with streaky clouds, hints of sea and pale stone
emotion: the gull is aggressive and predatory; the human reads as startled, defensive, mildly comedic
